messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Create a small library with one function and a unit test.
Clarifications:
None
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Create a small library with one function and a unit test.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "define-requirements",
      "title": "Define requirements and API",
      "description": "Specify the function's purpose, inputs, outputs, edge cases, and the required behavior for the unit test (including expected assertions).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A short specification that lists the function name, signature, parameter constraints, return type, and at least two test cases (including normal and edge case)."
    },
    {
      "id": "setup-project-structure",
      "title": "Set up project structure and tooling",
      "description": "Create repository files and folders (src/, test/), initialize package/config (package.json or equivalent), and add basic lint/test dependencies.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "define-requirements"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Project skeleton exists with source and test directories, dependency declarations, and scripts to run tests."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-function",
      "title": "Implement the library function",
      "description": "Write the function code in src/ according to the specification, include inline comments and handle defined edge cases and input validation.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "setup-project-structure",
        "define-requirements"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "A committed source file implementing the function that matches the declared signature and passes basic manual checks for the specified cases."
    },
    {
      "id": "write-unit-test",
      "title": "Write unit test(s) for the function",
      "description": "Create test file(s) that import the function and assert its behavior for normal and edge cases using the chosen test framework (e.g., Jest, pytest).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-function",
        "setup-project-structure"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "One or more automated tests are present that cover the specified test cases and can be executed by the test runner."
    },
    {
      "id": "configure-test-runner",
      "title": "Configure test runner and scripts",
      "description": "Add or update test scripts/configuration so tests can be run with a single command; ensure any required test runner configuration files are present.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "setup-project-structure"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A test command (e.g., npm test, pytest) runs the test suite via CI script or local command without additional manual setup."
    },
    {
      "id": "run-tests-and-verify",
      "title": "Run tests, fix failures, and finalize",
      "description": "Execute the test suite, investigate failures, patch implementation or tests as needed, and re-run until all tests pass; update documentation.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "write-unit-test",
        "implement-function",
        "configure-test-runner"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "All unit tests pass locally (exit code 0) and any fixes are committed; README updated with usage and test instructions."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 6,
  "decompositionStrategy": "Top-down iterative development: define the API and requirements first, create project scaffolding, implement the function, add tests, configure the runner, then run and fix tests until passing."
}
